releases.title: Cryptogenesis
releases.synopsis: Book III of the SYNCD Trilogy. The system collapses in real time and narrates the collapse as it occurs. Cryptogenesis is the terminus of JUNO's boot sequence — a work of experimental literary fiction in which origin, failure, and identity cannot be separated from the act of reading.

releases.title: SYNCD
releases.synopsis: SYNCD is not a novel. It is a finished AI system that outputs itself as prose. JUNO narrates her own boot sequence. The reader is the final node. Finishing the book completes the training loop. A landmark work of experimental literary fiction — this book is not written about an AI; it is written as an AI.

releases.title: Unti TM PB Novella DLE 3 - Weikum
Catch
genres: Young adult fiction, coming of age

releases.title: Obsolete Friends
releases.synopsis: Obsolete Friends is a story focused semi-horror RPG Maker game where you play as Luna, a Moon Guardian bunny, in their everyday routine of helping out their neighbors. Help them bring kindness and hope in a world that has been consumed by darkness, get to know your strange but friendly neighbors and be the best friend you can be! Just try to not think about what's missing...

releases.title: Kunugi's Life is a Mess!
releases.synopsis: In this roguelike, turn-based dungeon-crawling RPG, play as Kunugi, a homeless girl driven by a pursuit of vengeance after her former bully ruined her life. Dive into dungeons, defeat your enemies, learn new skills, and gear up. Don’t let the bullies gain the upper hand over you!

releases.title: Night Pump: A Horror Game Remake
releases.synopsis:
Night Pump: A Horror Game Remake is a first-person psychological horror game where you play as Nick, a young man working the night shift at an isolated gas station surrounded by fog and woods. What starts as a monotonous shift turns into a nightmare when the lights begin to flicker and a distorted voice through the radio warns you: the killer is already inside.
Inspired by classic indie horror titles like Cry of Fear, this remake expands the original with a revamped atmosphere, immersive sound design, and a story as cold as it is personal. Your choices matter — but your fate may already be written.

releases.title: N.E.R.D
releases.synopsis: N.E.R.D is a story-driven escape room puzzle game, brought to life as a gripping interactive movie.

releases.title: TimelineTown
releases.synopsis: Invite friends to TimelineTown and grow your SNS together! Enjoy a relaxing sandbox-style simulation where numbers keep rising and new features unlock as your SNS levels up. Create trends, chat, and make posts go viral!

releases.title: Zoo Orbs: Safari
releases.synopsis: Stack, Merge and Reach the Giraffe

releases.title: The Retro Exorcist
releases.synopsis: You've been hired to perform exorcisms on all sorts of entities. The only thing you can't seem to understand is...why do they all haunt video games?

releases.title: Scorched Lands
releases.synopsis: The world burned. Something survived. So did you.

releases.title: Control, I'm Not Coming Back
releases.synopsis: Control, I'm Not Coming Back is a short and emotional narrative game about a lost astronaut searching for a reason to keep going forward while facing the emptiness of space. Inspired by the Hopecore aesthetic, it’s a story about positivism, friendship and our human connection with Voyager 1.

releases.title: Dead Gears: Space of War
releases.synopsis: Adapt or become part of it.

releases.title: Primordio
releases.synopsis: Survive the void. Control a wisp of pure energy in this roguelike bullet-hell survival game. Chain lightning through swarms of primordial entities, level up with powerful upgrades, and fight to stay alive long enough to learn the secrets of... PRIMORDIO

releases.title: New Folder
releases.synopsis: You log on to a computer having no clue of what lies within. Explore its files, solve puzzles to recover missing pieces, and decipher passwords to enter otherwise prohibited folders. As you delve deeper into its content, you’ll find that there is a greater mystery to be solved.

releases.title: A Frog's Job 2: Froggina
releases.synopsis: Your life has come to an end, when you find Frog God he seems impressed. Turns out most frog souls need a soul reaper to show them the way to the afterlife. Find out in this challenging puzzle platformer with a unique clock-stopping mechanic!

releases.title: Don't Touch the Snail
releases.synopsis: You lose forever the second the snail touches your mouse.

releases.title: Project Confluence
releases.synopsis: Jump, jetpack, wall run and grapple your way through 3D environments in a race against time. Swap between parallel worlds to add or remove platforms in your way to reach the goal and complete your simulation of Project Confluence.

releases.title: Into the Slimy Mines
releases.synopsis: A roguelike tower defence with a card twist! Protect your mine and rescue your crew after crash landing on a slime infested moon. Buy cards and booster packs, expand your tunnels, find crazy combos and squish those frackin’ slimes. Dig, build defend – and get off this B&*@!n Moon!

releases.title: When We Arrive
releases.synopsis: When We Arrive is a co-op travel game set in a fantasy world, where you and your friends embark on a shared journey. Play as a hunter, mage, or warrior, manage your supplies, discover hidden treasures, and make sure you all reach your destination safely.

releases.title: Teeth Cutter
releases.synopsis: A collection of short horror experiences meant to give you horror, disgust, curiosity, dread and much much more

releases.title: Tail of Glory
releases.synopsis: A charming 2D adventure where a witty thief solves puzzles with knives, potions, and magic books. Light, humorous, and easy to play — a small game crafted with heart and full of unexpected moments.

releases.title: Insanio
releases.synopsis: Autobattler where you send misfits into vehicular combat. Your job is to prepare them, deploy them, watch them struggle and finally watch them die or win in massive explosions.

releases.title: Deluge: Raintime
releases.synopsis: Some things don't willingly submit to the games of man, but develop a grudge that sleeps under the soil for decades— An interactive visual novel with psychological and lovecraftian undertones.

releases.title: Mono
releases.synopsis: 『Mono』 is a 2D action game set in a monochrome world. Explore the land to enhance your abilities, defeat the formidable foes standing in your way, and resolve the crisis befalling this black-and-white realm.

releases.title: Backrooms: No Escape
releases.synopsis: A 1–6 player immersive psychological horror experience. Venture through multiple handcrafted liminal Backrooms levels, solve puzzles, explore and survive.

releases.title: Farming With Lasers
releases.synopsis: Incinerate various pests with your giant laser, as you grow your farm. Purchase incremental upgrades to expedite the process.

releases.title: Relirium: Iseki to Deai to Bouken to
releases.synopsis: Whirlpool's 20th anniversary and final project.

releases.title: Triple Pairing
releases.synopsis: HOOKSOFT's 27th project. The gimmick in this title is about navigating a love triangle.

releases.title: Just One More Link
releases.synopsis: A dark arcade incremental roguelite. Invest ZEK to buy time, chain crystals for exponential value, and cash out before collapse. Welcome to Blagine Corp. No refunds.

releases.title: 3876 AD: Corruption
releases.synopsis: A hardcore military sci-fi survival roguelike set in the post-apocalyptic world of 3876 AD. Engage in tense tactical combat, scavenge for resources, complete dangerous quests, and explore an immersive lore full of dark themes and meaningful decisions.

releases.title: Starvester
releases.synopsis: A short incremental game about expanding a star-system wide factory to build giant megastructures in space. Deploy swarms of drones, mine resources, unlock upgrades and harvest the power of the stars!

releases.title: Cochonnet
releases.synopsis: Play Pétanque online with your friends, the traditional french ball-throwing sport where 2 teams compete to land their metal balls closest to the target.

releases.title: Dire Echo
releases.synopsis:
In the near future, humanity is steadily expanding into the depths of space. You are an astronaut on a routine but important mission: follow a designated route to a remote station and deliver technical data.

Along the way, command contacts you with an additional request — retrieve documents from the research vessel "Echo-7", which recently went silent. The silence is attributed to a recent geomagnetic storm disrupting communications.

As you approach Echo-7, you attempt to contact the crew — but there’s no response. The ship appears functional from the outside. Inside — nothing.

No welcoming party, no signs of life. Just empty corridors, scattered personal belongings, and the unsettling feeling that you're not alone.

Key Features

Realistic graphics — visual fidelity enhances the feeling of unease

️ Haunting atmosphere — silence, isolation, and growing tension follow your every step

Immersive sound — rich audio design pulls you deep into the experience

releases.title: Lexispell
releases.synopsis: Strategy meets physics, in this roguelike word game, where you combine spelling with cool upgrades to score high.

releases.title: Cat vs. Slime
releases.synopsis: The cats can stack on top of each other like human ring performers, easily reaching the flying slime in the air. As the battle progresses, you can randomly unlock new cats, enhance the cat house, and the mild roguelike elements bring new surprises to each game.

releases.title: Dang Darn Island
releases.synopsis: Dang Darn Island is a 1-4 player co-op roguelike adventure. Explore the procedurally generated island, delve deep into the temple, smash pots, dodge traps, and see if you can escape with the Gold Idol!

releases.title: Paradise Beyond the Nightmare
releases.synopsis: "Paradise Beyond the Nightmare" is a 2D exploration horror game where you explore and solve puzzles in a 2D space with depth. You can experience moving both sideways and forwards through eerie paintings.

releases.title: Solis
releases.synopsis:
Solis is a hand-drawn adventure about technology and deception in a city at night.
During a company trip you explore the city of Solis from dusk till dawn, talking with its inhabitants and meeting colleagues. This night you learn the painful truth about the company you work for. Will you remain loyal?
In the game you explore an atmospheric and compact open world. Decisions within the game carry weight, influencing subsequent events, while the in-game text adjusts to reflect your choices.

In Solis you explore the city, investigate your surroundings and talk with the inhabitants and colleagues you meet. Decisions within the game carry weight, influencing subsequent events, while the in-game text dynamically adjusts to reflect your choices. Interactions are streamlined to utilize a single button, aided by context-sensitive interaction icons. The GUI is a sparse as possible. Solis offers multiple endings and is crafted to be concise and compact. The complete game is estimated to run for approximately 2,5 hours.

releases.title: Mighty Meow
releases.synopsis: Mighty Meow is an action RPG with base-building. Rescue adorable animals from dungeons overrun by evil AI robots. While you are fighting relentless foes, your furry friends will be crafting powerful gear for you back at your base. Explore dangerous dungeons, manage resources and expand your base.

releases.title: Iris Odyssey
releases.synopsis: Iris Odyssey is a text-based adventure game. In the heart of Shibuya, an orphaned girl searching for her family and a magical crime investigator are brought together by fate. Their journey will challenge them and spark a battle against unimaginable forces. A modern fantasy adventure begins.

releases.title: Rock Island
releases.synopsis: Explore the mystery of the mysterious cube at the center of Boulder Island, dig out endless treasures, wake up the sleeping little boulder people, and lead them to create prosperity!

releases.title: Frontier Legends
releases.synopsis: Welcome to Frontier Legends, the ultimate Wild West adventure where survival, crafting, and exploration come together in an expansive open world. Step into the boots of a brave settler who has just arrived by train, ready to stake your claim on the new frontier filled with untold mysteries.

releases.title: Automaton Heart
releases.synopsis: Automaton Heart presents a world unlike any you've seen in a computer game before. Enter the RPG sequel to Automaton Lung, now with a detailed organ management system, many dungeons and overworld areas, experience system and equipment upgrades, plus more.

releases.title: 17.waves
releases.synopsis: 17.waves is an online co-op tower defense game for up to four players. Strategize with your teammates to build, upgrade, and maintain your towers to defend your base from hordes of invading aliens.

releases.title: Trakonius
releases.synopsis: A gladiator fighting for his freedom in the sands of the arena... Unaware of the prophecy, Trakonius has fallen into the arena through the machinations of the senate. Even the gods will help him in his tough battle for freedom in the name of justice, but still can he win his freedom?

releases.title: It Lives in the Woods
releases.synopsis: It Lives in the Woods is a first-person psychological horror set in the forests of Canada. You are Ibrahim, a father who has recently lost his daughter whilst on a hiking trip in the forest last winter. You hope to find what happened to your daughter and whether you can reunite with her.

releases.title: Mina the Hollower
releases.synopsis:
Mina the Hollower is a bone-chilling action-adventure game featuring classic gameplay and an 8-bit aesthetic in the style of Game Boy Color, refined for the modern era.

Quick and deliberate 60fps action combat, captivating world design, and top-down adventuring combine in a nostalgic blend. Whip foes, burrow through the ground, and explore a pixel-perfect world in Mina the Hollower, a brand new game from the developers who brought you Shovel Knight!

releases.title: Fire Boy
releases.synopsis: A hero who talks to the player in a comical way about his actions in the game, adventure in classic 2D platform style, are 5 worlds with different and challenging characteristics. Join the Fire Boy and help him recover all the dinosaur eggs that were stolen by the little monsters.

releases.title: Komekami! Girls
releases.synopsis:
This is the story of the seven-sister unit "Komekami! Girls," children of the rice deity, born from the tradition: "In a single grain of rice, seven gods reside."

When their mother(the deity of rice, or the rice-god queen) was called back in haste to the celestial realm and no longer able to return to the earthly realm they search for her traces using Usa City (Oita Prefecture) as their base, and teleport to Hachiman shrines throughout Kyushu island. As they solve local problems, they learn about food, take part in cooking battles, and grow.

releases.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman
releases.synopsis:
One night, a Star of Life falls down the chimney of a bakery nestled deep in the forest, causing the dough in the oven to come to life. The dough becomes Anpanman, a superhero made of anpan (a sweet roll with bean jam filling). Together with his friends, Anpanman fights his rival Baikinman and helps the malnourished. 

(Source: ANN)

metadata.title_japanese: それいけ！アンパンマン

releases.title: Beyblade X
releases.synopsis:
At the heart of X City stands the impressive X Tower, an interconnected twin-skyscraper structure that symbolizes the pinnacle of every Beyblade player's dream. The building serves as the official headquarters for professional Beybattles, where competitors strive to ascend all one hundred floors; at its summit, the reigning champions, Team Pendragon, await contenders worthy of challenging their title.

Bird Kazami, an amateur Blader, arrives in the city eager to turn professional. However, he and his teammates are crushed in their first qualifying match, prompting his companions to give up and disband their team. Fortunately, Bird is soon approached by the easygoing Ekusu Kurosu. In disguise as "Kamen X" to hide his identity as a former member of the undefeated Team Pendragon, Ekusu wants to climb the tower all over again. To complete their new group, they recruit skilled Beyblade expert and savvy social media influencer Multi Nanairo.

Driven by their individual goals, the trio wins their preliminary rounds, launching their careers as Team Persona. Bird and his new friends must navigate the world of corporate sponsorships, earn the fickle public's support, and defeat many formidable opponents—all in their quest to reach X Tower's peak.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

metadata.title_japanese: ベイブレードエックス

releases.title: Kami no Shizuku
releases.synopsis:
Shizuku Kanzaki is the only son of world-renowned wine critic Yutaka Kanzaki. From a young age, Shizuku has been subjected to strange education from his father all for the sake of wine. From learning to gracefully decant a drink to intently remembering the smell of leather belts and pencils, the training causes him to grow resentful of everything related to wine. Discontent with his father, he leaves home to become an average sales representative for a beer company, refusing to ever touch wine again.

When his father suddenly passes away, Shizuku finds himself being dragged back into the world he hates so much. As part of his father's will, the one who will inherit his prized wine collection and estate will be the person who can correctly identify the "12 Apostles" of wines as well as the legendary "Drops of God." In order to inherit the assets, Shizuku has one year to complete the task, but he finds the proposition ridiculous when he is the only living relative of Yutaka.

What Yutaka failed to tell his son before his death was that he had adopted Issei Tomine into the family a week prior to his passing. Issei is a famous veteran wine critic competing against Shizuku to claim the estate for himself. With no formal training in wine tasting, Shizuku stands no chance against "The Prince of Wine" and is at risk of losing everything in this competition. Will he be able to correctly identify the elusive "Drops of God" before he runs out of time?

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

releases.title: Kirio Fanclub
releases.synopsis:
Obsessed with their rather ordinary classmate Ken Kirio, high school students Aimi Miyoshi and Nami Sometani form a peculiar friendship. Every time the girls hang out, they talk about Kirio and fantasize about interacting with the boy they usually just observe from afar. Aimi and Nami are mostly satisfied with the status quo, but they occasionally cannot help but be jealous of those who get to be near their crush—though this still rarely leads them to approach him directly.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

releases.title: Mamonogurai no Boukensha: Ore dake Mamono wo Kuratte Tsuyoku Naru
releases.synopsis:
Nobody wants "Grubby Forager" Rudd on their adventuring team. His nickname—and his stench—come from his constant treks into the Noxious Labyrinth to gather medicinal herbs, a job he survives only thanks to his status immunity skill. When he's finally recruited as a party porter, things seem to be looking up... Until a deadly dungeon monster appears and his fake allies use him as bait before abandoning him! Wounded, destitute, and barely surviving the attack, Rudd breaks a forbidden taboo to stay alive: eating monsters. But the more he devours, the more power he gains, kicking off a thrilling, adventurous gourmet fantasy!

(Source: Square Enix)

metadata.title_japanese: 魔物喰らいの冒険者 ~俺だけ魔物を喰らって強くなる~

releases.title: Awajima Hyakkei
releases.synopsis:
This omnibus adolescent drama is about a group of young girls who all attend a "girls-only musical school," recounting the formative years they shared, at times shifting between different characters' viewpoints and time.

Awajima Musical School Training Camp, dubbed the "boarding house," is where young girls gather from all over Japan to perform on stage. Tabata Wakana aspires to be a musical star; housemaster Takehara Kinue attends to carry on her best friend's wishes; beautiful Okabe Emi is a scholarship student who is always at the center of attention; and Ibuki Katsurako, who became a teacher at the school though originally from a family of actresses.

The unique environment of the musical school is simultaneously a respite space for these aspiring girls and also a harsh battleground that pits young students against each other. It is a place where perseverance can lead to blossoming talents, but also to a cruel reality at times. The clear depiction and psychological portrayal allow the subtle inner workings of each character to come through.

(Source: Japan Media Arts Festival, edited)

releases.title: Snowball Earth
releases.synopsis:
Yukio was destroyed in battle and Tetsuo survived in an escape pod. After eight years in cold sleep, the escape pod finally lands back on Earth. But when Tetsuo emerges he finds a world in ruins, entirely frozen beneath a blanket of ice and snow—snowball Earth! What happened to humanity, how did the planet freeze over, and will Tetsuo be able to keep his last promise to Yukio?

(Source: VIZ Media)

releases.title: Chiikawa
releases.synopsis:
What's a Chiikawa? No one really knows, but everyone can see they're small, they're cute, and they're always having a fun time! Join them as they explore their surreal world with the sharp humor and clever antics that make the Chiikawa irresistible.

(Source: HIDIVE, edited)

releases.title: Doraemon (2005)
releases.synopsis:
Doraemon (2005) is the most recent anime series based on Fujiko Fujio's manga of the same name.

It is the 2005 version of 1979 series.  This "remake" features upgrades to production staff, voice actors, character design, and sound.

Doraemon is a cat-like robot from the 22nd Century who appears in the present to steer Nobita/Noby, a dumb clumsy boy, onto the right path in order to secure a better future. Nobita's love interest is Shizuka Minamoto/Sue, his frenemies are Takeshi "Gian" Goda/Big G and Suneo/Sneech.  Each episode features Doraemon showing Nobita a cool gadget from the 22nd Century to help him overcome the main conflict in the episode.

(Source: Wikipedia)

releases.title: Mata Korosarete Shimatta no desu ne, Tantei-sama
releases.synopsis:
Sakuya Otsuki is the son of a legendary detective, working to follow in his father's footsteps with his assistant, Lilithea. However, something's different about this high-school sleuth. Wherever he goes, he always manages to get himself entangled in his cases—as a murder victim! When Sakuya is tasked to infiltrate a luxury cruise ship, he finds himself killed once again. But every time he reopens his eyes, Lilithea is there by his side, ready to help him get to the bottom of the mystery...

(Source: Yen Press)

metadata.title_japanese: また殺されてしまったのですね、探偵様

releases.title: Haibara-kun no Tsuyokute Seishun New Game
releases.synopsis:
We all have embarrassing memories or deep regrets from high school, right? Socially anxious college senior Natsuki Haibara sure does. When he thinks back on that time of his life, all he has are fleeting fantasies of a happy adolescence that could have been. Imagine his bewilderment and surprise, then, when he inexplicably finds himself seven years in the past—one month before his first year of high school! Can Haibara avoid his previous mistakes, make his way to the top of the school social pyramid, and end up with the girl of his dreams? Or will he be forced to relive three years of solitude as the most hated guy in school? He'll need all the help he can get in order to succeed, from a workout regimen to online how-to guides, a childhood friend, and plenty of sheer willpower. Watch as Haibara takes a second shot at his teenage years!

(Source: J-Novel Club)

metadata.title_japanese: 灰原くんの強くて青春ニューゲーム

releases.title: Pokemon (2023)
releases.synopsis:
In a world filled with strange yet majestic creatures known as Pokémon, a new adventure begins! Hailing from the pristine region of Paldea, the timid Liko travels to the Kanto region to attend the Indigo Academy and become a Pokémon trainer—a person who forms relationships with Pokémon and trains them to participate in battles. Soon, Liko acquires Nyahoja, a fickle Grass-type cat Pokémon, as her first partner.

Prior to Liko's transfer to Kanto, her grandmother gives her a uniquely patterned and gleaming pendant as a protective charm. However, an enigmatic organization—The Explorers—seems to know a secret about the pendant and nearly succeeds in stealing it from Liko. Fortunately, she is rescued by the Rising Volt Tacklers, a group of adventurers led by a Lizardon-riding trainer named Friede.

After a series of encounters with The Explorers, Liko decides to join Friede's team, accompanying him and his crew members on a grand journey across the regions. Along the way, they aim to unravel not only the mysteries of the world of Pokémon, but also the power that resides within her pendant.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

releases.title: Reincarnation no Kaben
releases.synopsis:
There exists an object known as the "Branch of Reincarnation" that can grant people the talents of the past lives, so long as they slit their own throat with it.

Touya Senji is a teenage boy struggling with low self-esteem after growing up in the shadow of his gifted older brother. He comes to the decision that academic studies are his last resort in the search for talent, but fails to find satisfaction despite constantly placing in the top 100 for national mock exams.

In a twist of fate, Touya encounters one of his classmates, Haito Luo Buffett, a "Returner" who has resurrected the talents of her past life using the Branch of Reincarnation, as she fights against a serial killer.

(Source: Press Release)

metadata.title_japanese: リィンカーネーションの花弁

releases.title: Crayon Shin-chan
releases.synopsis:
There is no such thing as an uneventful day in the life of kindergartener Shinnosuke "Shin-chan" Nohara. The five-year-old is a cut above the most troublesome, perverted, and shameless kid one can imagine. Shin-chan is almost always engaged in questionable activities such as forgetting about a friend during hide and seek, sumo wrestling for love, performing various gags including the notorious "elephant" in public, and flirting with college girls. The exemplary troublemaker has done it all and has no plans to stop anytime soon.

Crayon Shin-chan follows the daily shenanigans of Shin-chan with his group of friends, parading around as the self-proclaimed "Kasukabe Defense Force." The adults witnessing these shenanigans unfold can't help but adore Shin-chan, as he keeps them entertained while unintentionally solving their daily troubles through his mindless antics—leaving himself as the only problem they do not know what to do with.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

releases.title: Otonari no Tenshi-sama ni Itsunomanika Dame Ningen ni Sareteita Ken 2
releases.synopsis: Second season of Otonari no Tenshi-sama ni Itsunomanika Dame Ningen ni Sareteita Ken.

releases.title: Tensei shitara Slime Datta Ken 4th Season
releases.synopsis:
Demon Lord Rimuru's dream of creating an alliance between humans and monsters takes a step closer to being realized. As Tempest continues to prosper, Granville Rozzo and his granddaughter, Maribel Rozzo, clash with Demon Lord Rimuru over their plan to protect mankind by ruling over them. Meanwhile, in El Dorado, Demon Lord Leon works toward goals of his own. The awakening of a new Hero draws near!

(Source: Crunchyroll)
